locator.quote: everything goes naked → force-closes → mat% 0. Fixed

text: The untrained Beta stake head sits at stake_unit≈0.5 giving £50–100 stakes too big to post, so everything goes naked then force-closes then mat% 0; fixed with --fixed-stake-unit 0.1.
With the stake pinned, the warm-start reproduces the BC result: opened 278, mat% 13.3%, locked +£16.4 at £10/open.
